title: AI API Playbook: Production Patterns, Provider Examples, and Commercial Blueprints
description: A reproducible, provider-aware reference implementation for building, evaluating, securing, and commercializing AI API applications. Includes tested Python abstractions, runnable examples, project blueprints, a Colab notebook, and a companion infographic book.
notes: Source repository: https://github.com/FaramarzKowsari/ai-api-playbook. Companion book DOI: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.21431944
